meaning: n.受尊敬的人,高洁的人,公正的人(亦作 mensh)
examples: He yearned to be a mensch, a pillar of the country.
Mrs Mensch did not blench. "it is a much bigger ship, but you are in charge of it."
The by-election was sparked by the resignation in August of sitting Conservative MP Louise Mensch.
Microblogging website Menshn, launched seven months ago by former Conservative MP Louise Mensch, has closed.
